hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO FA with (nolock) left join SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) on FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO where 1=1 AND isnull(FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO,0) = ISNULL(:p_idreglanegocio,isnull(FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO,0)) AND FA.ID_CORREO = ISNULL(:idcorreo,FA.ID_CORREO) AND cast(FA.CREACION_FECHA as date) BETWEEN cast(:fechaPreparacionInicio as date) AND cast(:fechaPreparacionFin as date) AND FA.ESTADO = ISNULL(:p_estado,FA.ESTADO) AND (ISNULL(:p_resumenlogalerta, '-') = '-' OR FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA = :p_resumenlogalerta) AND ( FA.ID_CORREO IN (SELECT ID_CORREO FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO_DESTINO DES with (nolock) WHERE DES.CORREO_DESTINO = ISNULL(:p_correodestino,DES.CORREO_DESTINO)) OR FA.ID_CORREO=FA.ID_CORREO ) AND ISNULL(PROCESO_ID, '-') = ISNULL( :p_proceso , ISNULL(PROCESO_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(REFERENCIA_ID, '-') like '%' + ISNULL( :p_referencia , ISNULL(REFERENCIA_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PADRE_ID, '-') like '%' + ISNULL( :p_padrereferencia , ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PADRE_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PRINCIPAL_ID, '-') like '%' + ISNULL( :p_principalreferencia , ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PRINCIPAL_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(TRANSACCION_ID, '-') = ISNULL( :p_transaccion , ISNULL(TRANSACCION_ID, '-') )

select FA.ID_CORREO AS "idCorreo", FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA AS "resumenLogAlerta", RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AS "idReglaNegocio", RN.NOMBRE AS "nombre", FA.CREACION_FECHA as "creacionFecha", FA.ESTADO AS "estado", FA.PERFIL_CORREO_ID AS "perfilCorreoId", FA.FECHA_HORA_ENVIO AS "fechaHoraEnvio", CAST(FA.ASUNTO as varchar(500)) as "asunto", PROCESO_ID as "proceso", REFERENCIA_ID as "referencia", REFERENCIA_PADRE_ID as "referenciaPadre", TRANSACCION_ID as "transaccion", FA.REFERENCIA_PRINCIPAL_ID AS "referenciaPrincipalId" FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO FA with (nolock) left join SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) on FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO where 1=1 AND isnull(FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO,0) = ISNULL(:p_idreglanegocio,isnull(FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO,0)) AND FA.ID_CORREO = ISNULL(:idcorreo,FA.ID_CORREO) AND cast(FA.CREACION_FECHA as date) BETWEEN cast(:fechaPreparacionInicio as date) AND cast(:fechaPreparacionFin as date) AND FA.ESTADO = ISNULL(:p_estado,FA.ESTADO) AND (ISNULL(:p_resumenlogalerta, '-') = '-' OR FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA = :p_resumenlogalerta) AND ( FA.ID_CORREO IN (SELECT ID_CORREO FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO_DESTINO DES with (nolock) WHERE DES.CORREO_DESTINO = ISNULL(:p_correodestino,DES.CORREO_DESTINO)) OR FA.ID_CORREO=FA.ID_CORREO ) AND ISNULL(PROCESO_ID, '-') = ISNULL( :p_proceso , ISNULL(PROCESO_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(REFERENCIA_ID, '-') like '%' + ISNULL( :p_referencia , ISNULL(REFERENCIA_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PADRE_ID, '-') like '%' + ISNULL( :p_padrereferencia , ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PADRE_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PRINCIPAL_ID, '-') like '%' + ISNULL( :p_principalreferencia , ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PRINCIPAL_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(TRANSACCION_ID, '-') = ISNULL( :p_transaccion , ISNULL(TRANSACCION_ID, '-') ) order by FA.ID_CORREO desc

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO FA with (nolock) left join SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) on FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO where 1=1 AND isnull(FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO,0) = ISNULL(:p_idreglanegocio,isnull(FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO,0)) AND FA.ID_CORREO = ISNULL(:idcorreo,FA.ID_CORREO) AND cast(FA.CREACION_FECHA as date) BETWEEN cast(:fechaPreparacionInicio as date) AND cast(:fechaPreparacionFin as date) AND FA.ESTADO = ISNULL(:p_estado,FA.ESTADO) AND (ISNULL(:p_resumenlogalerta, '-') = '-' OR FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA = :p_resumenlogalerta) AND ( FA.ID_CORREO IN (SELECT ID_CORREO FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO_DESTINO DES with (nolock) WHERE DES.CORREO_DESTINO = ISNULL(:p_correodestino,DES.CORREO_DESTINO)) OR FA.ID_CORREO=FA.ID_CORREO ) AND ISNULL(PROCESO_ID, '-') = ISNULL( :p_proceso , ISNULL(PROCESO_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(REFERENCIA_ID, '-') like '%' + ISNULL( :p_referencia , ISNULL(REFERENCIA_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PADRE_ID, '-') like '%' + ISNULL( :p_padrereferencia , ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PADRE_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PRINCIPAL_ID, '-') like '%' + ISNULL( :p_principalreferencia , ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PRINCIPAL_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(TRANSACCION_ID, '-') = ISNULL( :p_transaccion , ISNULL(TRANSACCION_ID, '-') ) AND isnull(FA.PROCESO_ID,'')+'-'+isnull(FA.ACCION_ID,'') not in ('GP-BIENVENIDA')

select FA.ID_CORREO AS "idCorreo", FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA AS "resumenLogAlerta", RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AS "idReglaNegocio", RN.NOMBRE AS "nombre", FA.CREACION_FECHA as "creacionFecha", FA.ESTADO AS "estado", FA.FECHA_HORA_ENVIO AS "fechaHoraEnvio", FA.PERFIL_CORREO_ID AS "perfilCorreoId", CAST(FA.ASUNTO as varchar(500)) as "asunto", PROCESO_ID as "proceso", REFERENCIA_ID as "referencia", REFERENCIA_PADRE_ID as "referenciaPadre", TRANSACCION_ID as "transaccion", FA.REFERENCIA_PRINCIPAL_ID AS "referenciaPrincipalId" FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO FA with (nolock) left join SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) on FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO where 1=1 AND isnull(FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO,0) = ISNULL(:p_idreglanegocio,isnull(FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO,0)) AND FA.ID_CORREO = ISNULL(:idcorreo,FA.ID_CORREO) AND cast(FA.CREACION_FECHA as date) BETWEEN cast(:fechaPreparacionInicio as date) AND cast(:fechaPreparacionFin as date) AND FA.ESTADO = ISNULL(:p_estado,FA.ESTADO) AND (ISNULL(:p_resumenlogalerta, '-') = '-' OR FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA = :p_resumenlogalerta) AND ( FA.ID_CORREO IN (SELECT ID_CORREO FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO_DESTINO DES with (nolock) WHERE DES.CORREO_DESTINO = ISNULL(:p_correodestino,DES.CORREO_DESTINO)) OR FA.ID_CORREO=FA.ID_CORREO ) AND ISNULL(PROCESO_ID, '-') = ISNULL( :p_proceso , ISNULL(PROCESO_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(REFERENCIA_ID, '-') like '%' + ISNULL( :p_referencia , ISNULL(REFERENCIA_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PADRE_ID, '-') like '%' + ISNULL( :p_padrereferencia , ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PADRE_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PRINCIPAL_ID, '-') like '%' + ISNULL( :p_principalreferencia , ISNULL(REFERENCIA_PRINCIPAL_ID, '-') ) AND ISNULL(TRANSACCION_ID, '-') = ISNULL( :p_transaccion , ISNULL(TRANSACCION_ID, '-') ) AND isnull(FA.PROCESO_ID,'')+'-'+isnull(FA.ACCION_ID,'') not in ('GP-BIENVENIDA') order by FA.ID_CORREO desc

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO FA with (nolock) INNER JOIN SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) ON FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO where FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = ISNULL(:idreglanegocio,FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO) AND FA.ID_CORREO = ISNULL(:idcorreo,FA.ID_CORREO) AND cast(FA.CREACION_FECHA as date) BETWEEN cast(:fechaPreparacionInicio as date) AND cast(:fechaPreparacionFin as date) AND FA.ESTADO = ISNULL(:p_estado,FA.ESTADO) AND ISNULL(FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA,'') = ISNULL(:p_resumenlogalerta,ISNULL(FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA,''))
AND FA.ID_CORREO IN (SELECT COR.ID_CORREO FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO COR with (nolock) INNER JOIN SGALERTASSYS.CORREO_DESTINO CDE with (nolock) ON COR.ID_CORREO = CDE.ID_CORREO WHERE COR.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = ISNULL(:idreglanegocio,COR.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO) AND cast(COR.CREACION_FECHA as date) BETWEEN cast(:fechaPreparacionInicio as date) AND cast(:fechaPreparacionFin as date) AND FA.ESTADO = ISNULL(:p_estado,FA.ESTADO) AND ISNULL(COR.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA,'') = ISNULL(:p_resumenlogalerta,ISNULL(COR.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA,'')) AND UPPER(CDE.CORREO_DESTINO) LIKE '%' + :p_correodestino + '%')

select FA.ID_CORREO AS "idCorreo", FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA AS "resumenLogAlerta", RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AS "idReglaNegocio", RN.NOMBRE AS "nombre", FA.CREACION_FECHA as "creacionFecha", FA.ESTADO AS "estado", FA.FECHA_HORA_ENVIO AS "fechaHoraEnvio" FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO FA with (nolock) INNER JOIN SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) ON FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO where FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = ISNULL(:idreglanegocio,FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO) AND FA.ID_CORREO = ISNULL(:idcorreo,FA.ID_CORREO) AND cast(FA.CREACION_FECHA as date) BETWEEN cast(:fechaPreparacionInicio as date) AND cast(:fechaPreparacionFin as date) AND FA.ESTADO = ISNULL(:p_estado,FA.ESTADO) AND ISNULL(FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA,'') = ISNULL(:p_resumenlogalerta,ISNULL(FA.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA,''))
AND FA.ID_CORREO IN (SELECT COR.ID_CORREO FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO COR with (nolock) INNER JOIN SGALERTASSYS.CORREO_DESTINO CDE with (nolock) ON COR.ID_CORREO = CDE.ID_CORREO WHERE COR.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = ISNULL(:idreglanegocio,COR.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO) AND cast(COR.CREACION_FECHA as date) BETWEEN cast(:fechaPreparacionInicio as date) AND cast(:fechaPreparacionFin as date) AND FA.ESTADO = ISNULL(:p_estado,FA.ESTADO) AND ISNULL(COR.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA,'') = ISNULL(:p_resumenlogalerta,ISNULL(COR.RESUMEN_LOG_ALERTA,'')) AND UPPER(CDE.CORREO_DESTINO) LIKE '%' + :p_correodestino + '%') order by FA.ID_CORREO desc
SELECT RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AS "id" ,RN.NOMBRE AS "descripcion" FROM SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) WHERE RN.ESTADO = ISNULL(:p_estado, RN.ESTADO) ORDER BY RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO ASC

SELECT P.PARAMETROCLAVE as "codigo" ,P.EXPLICACION as "nombre" FROM VW_REMOTO_ParametrosMast P with (nolock) WHERE P.PARAMETROCLAVE IN ('RUTAADJUN','MAILCLAVE','MAILCUENTA','MAILENV','MAILFLGPRU','MAILFLGSSL','MAILHOST','MAILPUERTO','MAILASINC','MAILPRUEBA','MAILRUTATM','MAIFLGCRED','TRACEFLG','MAILREMITE','MAICOPIOCU' ,'MAILFLG2SL','MAILDEBUG','MAILTRPROT','MAILOCALHO','MAILCNTIME','MAILTIMEOU','MAILWRTIME','MAILSSLPRO')

SELECT P.clave as "codigo" ,P.valor as "nombre" FROM VW_REMOTO_SY_PerfilCorreo P with (nolock) WHERE p.PerfilCorreoId = :p_perfilorreoid AND P.CLAVE IN ('RUTAADJUN','MAILCLAVE','MAILCUENTA','MAILENV','MAILFLGPRU','MAILFLGSSL','MAILHOST','MAILPUERTO','MAILASINC','MAILPRUEBA','MAILRUTATM','MAIFLGCRED','TRACEFLG','MAILREMITE','MAICOPIOCU' ,'MAILFLG2SL','MAILDEBUG','MAILTRPROT','MAILOCALHO','MAILCNTIME','MAILTIMEOU','MAILWRTIME','MAILSSLPRO')
SELECT P.PerfilCorreoId as "codigo" FROM VW_REMOTO_SY_PerfilCorreo P with (nolock) group by P.PerfilCorreoId

select CAST(ID_CORREO as money) as "idCorreo", LTRIM(RTRIM(REFERENCIA_ID)) as "referencia" , FECHA_HORA_ENVIO as "fechaHoraEnvio", CREACION_FECHA as "creacionFecha" from SGALERTASSYS.CORREO with (nolock) where REFERENCIA_ID = :p_referencia and ACCION_ID = 'ESTUDIO MERCADO'
SELECT TOP (:p_cantidad - 1) CAST(ID_CORREO as INT) AS "id", PERFIL_CORREO_ID AS "codigo" FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO with (nolock) WHERE ESTADO = 'PEN' AND ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = :p_idReglaNegocio
SELECT TOP (999) CAST(ID_ALERTA AS int) AS "id", CAST(ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AS int) AS "id2" FROM SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA with (nolock) WHERE ESTADO = 'A' AND FLG_CORREO_GENERADO = 'N'
SELECT TOP (:p_cantidad - 1) ID_CORREO AS "id", PERFIL_CORREO_ID AS "codigo" FROM SGALERTASSYS.CORREO with (nolock) WHERE ESTADO = 'PEN' AND (ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO IS NULL OR ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = 0)
